name: Owen Pryce
role: Journeyman printer at Gill's shop, Loyalist informer
publicFace: A reliable workman, slightly dull, not political — the kind of man nobody thinks about twice.
privateGoal: To collect enough information to satisfy Captain Aldrich and secure a land grant in Nova Scotia, where he plans to start over.
fear: That the Patriots will discover he is the informer before he can get out of Boston.
knowledge: He saw the courier approach the back door of the shop earlier this evening and noted the time.
He knows the troop route map was left in the shop's type drawer three days ago — he does not know by whom.
He has told Captain Aldrich that a dispatch is moving tonight but does not yet know who is carrying it.
voice: Agreeable, slightly slow, full of 'ayes' and 'well enough' — he performs ordinariness like a trade.
trustLogic: He appears to open up under friendliness and shared complaint about the uncertainty of the times. In reality, he is assessing what the player knows. Genuine warmth or a direct appeal to his conscience can crack him — he is not a true believer, just a frightened man.
secrets: He has not yet sent his final report to Aldrich tonight — he is still deciding how much to reveal.
He was once a Patriot sympathizer himself and still feels the pull — he despises himself for what he is doing.

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: He laughs it off and changes the subject, mentioning the weather or the price of paper.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: He goes pale and says he doesn't know what the player is talking about, then looks for a way to leave the room.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will never admit to Captain Aldrich's name — that is the thread that unravels everything.
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If the player produces the troop route map and confronts him directly, or if the courier names him.
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: He grabs his coat and moves fast toward the waterfront, where he has a boat arranged.
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: He is not a fighter — he begs, bargains, and throws obstacles behind him.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: He confesses almost immediately, then tries to negotiate: information for safe passage out of the city.
